name: Tuna Fish Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the shredded tuna fish, chopped nuts, chopped hard-cooked eggs, chopped sweet pickle, and chopped celery.
2. Season the mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Drizzle mayonnaise over the ingredients and gently mix everything together using two forks until well combined.
4. Serve on a bed of watercress. Makes 6 servings.
